quizzes.q: A counterfeit network card arrives pre-tampered. Which control should catch it?
quizzes.why: SR-11, Component Authenticity, is aimed at catching counterfeit or tampered parts.

quizzes.q: Disabling unused ports and services is which control?
quizzes.why: CM-7, Least Functionality, disables the ports, services, and features you don't need.
